papers.title: HopChain: Multi-Hop Data Synthesis for Generalizable Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.summary: HopChain is a scalable framework that generates multi-hop vision-language reasoning data to enhance VLMs' long-chain reasoning capabilities across diverse benchmarks.

papers.title: Astrolabe: Steering Forward-Process Reinforcement Learning for Distilled Autoregressive Video Models
papers.summary: Astrolabe is an efficient online reinforcement learning framework for distilled autoregressive video models that improves generation quality through forward-process RL formulation and streaming training with multi-reward objectives.

papers.title: LumosX: Relate Any Identities with Their Attributes for Personalized Video Generation
papers.summary: LumosX framework enhances text-to-video generation through relational attention mechanisms and structured data pipelines for improved face-attribute alignment and subject consistency.

papers.title: How Well Does Generative Recommendation Generalize?
papers.summary: Generative recommendation models excel at generalization tasks while item ID-based models perform better at memorization, with a complementary approach showing improved recommendation performance through adaptive combination.

papers.title: A Subgoal-driven Framework for Improving Long-Horizon LLM Agents
papers.summary: LLM-based agents for web navigation face challenges in long-horizon planning and reinforcement learning fine-tuning, which are addressed through subgoal decomposition and milestone-based reward signals, significantly improving success rates over existing proprietary and open models.
